ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Decide how to integrate commits from your remote branch into your local branch.
ast.target: Decide how to integrate commits from your remote branch into your local branch.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Decide how to solve conflicts when pulling remote changes. This can be used to favor your local changes or the remote changes automatically.
ast.target: Decide how to solve conflicts when pulling remote changes. This can be used to favor your local changes or the remote changes automatically.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.
ast.target: Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.
ast.target: Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.
ast.target: This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.
ast.target: Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: Show the author of the commit in the history view.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.
ast.target: Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.

ast.target: Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.
ast.target: Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.

Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.

regex.source: setDesc("Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.")
regex.target: setDesc("使用默认设置的提交并同步意味着：暂存所有更改 -> 提交 -> 拉取 -> 推送。理想情况下，这是一项你定期执行的单一操作，用于保持本地和远程仓库同步。")

regex.source: setDesc(`Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"and pull ":""}only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`大多数情况下，你希望在提交后进行推送。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作转换为仅提交${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"并拉取 ":""}。它仍然被称为提交并同步。`)

regex.source: setDesc(`On commit-and-sync, pull commits as well. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.disablePush?"":"and push "}only.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`在提交并同步时，也会拉取提交。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作转换为仅提交${i.settings.disablePush?"":"并推送 "}。`)

regex.source: setDesc("Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.")
regex.target: setDesc("块是编辑器中分组的行更改段落。")

regex.source: setDesc("This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.")
regex.target: setDesc("这使你能够通过彩色标记在编辑器中直接查看更改，并对单个块进行暂存/重置/预览。")

regex.source: setDesc("Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.")
regex.target: setDesc("添加命令以暂存/重置单个 Git 差异块，并通过‘转到下一个/上一个块’命令在它们之间导航。")

regex.source: setName("Status bar with summary of line changes")
regex.target: setName("状态栏显示行更改摘要")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the author of the commit in the history view.")
regex.target: setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的作者。")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.")
regex.target: setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的日期。使用 {{date}} 占位符格式来显示日期。")

regex.source: setName("Automatically refresh source control view on file changes")
regex.target: setName("文件更改时自动刷新源代码管理视图")

regex.source: setDesc("On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.")
regex.target: setDesc("在较慢的机器上可能会导致卡顿。如有此情况，请禁用此选项。")
setName("源代码管理视图刷新间隔")

regex.source: setDesc("Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.")
regex.target: setDesc("文件更改后等待的毫秒数，以在刷新源代码管理视图之前。")

regex.source: setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')
regex.target: setDesc('设置差异视图的样式。请注意，在 "Split" 模式下的实际差异并非由 Git 生成，而是由编辑器本身生成，因此可能与 Git 生成的差异不同。此方式的一个优势是您可以在该视图中编辑文本。')

regex.source: setDesc("Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("禁用 git 操作的信息性通知以减少干扰（请参阅状态栏获取更新）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("禁用任何形式的错误通知以减少干扰（请参阅状态栏获取更新）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.")
regex.target: setDesc("当没有可提交或推送的更改时不显示通知。")

regex.source: setDesc("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
regex.target: setDesc("Obsidian 必须重新启动才能使更改生效。")

regex.source: setDesc('Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.')
regex.target: setDesc('在文件菜单中添加 "Stage", "Unstage" 和 "Add to .gitignore" 操作。')

regex.source: setName("Show the count of modified files in the status bar")
regex.target: setName("在状态栏显示已修改文件的计数")

regex.source: setName("Username on your git server. E.g. your username on GitHub")
regex.target: setName("Git 服务器上的用户名。例如，你在 GitHub 上的用户名")

regex.source: setDesc("Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.")
regex.target: setDesc("输入你的密码。你将无法再次看到它。")

regex.source: setDesc("These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.")
regex.target: setDesc("这些设置通常不需要更改，但在特殊配置时可能需要。")

regex.source: setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.')
regex.target: setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" 和 "pull" 负责子模块。缺少的功能：冲突文件、已拉取/已推送/已提交文件的计数。需要为每个子模块设置跟踪分支。')

regex.source: setDesc("Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).")
regex.target: setDesc("每当在根仓库进行检出时，递归地在子模块上执行检出（如果分支存在）。")
setName("自定义 Git 可执行文件路径")

regex.source: setDesc("Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.")
regex.target: setDesc("指定 Git 可执行文件的路径。Git 应已在您的 PATH 中。仅在自定义 Git 安装时需要。")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")
regex.target: setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for one path")
regex.target: setDesc("Use each line for one path")

regex.source: setDesc("Removing previously added environment variables will not take effect until Obsidian is restarted.")
regex.target: setDesc("Removing previously added environment variables will not take effect until Obsidian is restarted.")

regex.source:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)
regex.target:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)

regex.source: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
regex.target: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')

regex.source: setDesc("Disables the plugin on this device. This setting is not synced.")
regex.target: setDesc("在此设备上禁用插件。此设置不同步。")

regex.source: Notice("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
regex.target: Notice("Obsidian 必须重新启动以使更改生效。")

regex.source: setDesc("If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.")
regex.target: setDesc("如果您喜欢此插件，请考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。")

regex.target: Notice("调试信息已复制到剪贴板。可能包含敏感信息！")

regex.source: text:"Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same."
regex.target: text:"空白和换行默认被解释为文档的一部分并计入更改（因此不会被忽略）。这会导致在添加新后续行时，最后一行显示为‘已更改’，即使之前的最后一行文本相同。"

regex.source: text:"If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection."
regex.target: text:"如果您不在乎纯空白更改（例如列表嵌套/引用缩进更改），则启用此项将提供更有意义的更改检测。"
